hero.title: Kubva pakudiwa kwekuwanika kusvika kuzvitoro zvevoruzhinji
hero.lead: IATF inobatsira masangano, mapoka, uye vanhu voga voga kushandura zvido zvechokwadi zvekuwanika kuva mapurojekiti eruzhinji akavhurika.
support: Zvirongwa zvinogamuchirwa zvinoburitswa muIATF GitHub sangano pasi pecopyleft rezinesi uye rakagadziriswa paruzhinji neinjiniya ane mutoro.

paragraphs: Kuburikidza nefomu, chero munhu anogona kutumira dambudziko rekuwanika kuIATF. Kana timu ichigona kuitora, nzvimbo yeruzhinji yeGitHub inovhurwa yebasa.
Chirongwa chimwe nechimwe chinogamuchirwa chine musha wevoruzhinji wakajeka wekodhi, nyaya, zvinyorwa, uye zvinoburitswa, nekusimudzira kunotungamirwa pachena neinjiniya ane mutoro.

header.title: Mashandiro ainoita
header.intro: Muenzaniso wacho unoramba uri muduku nemaune kuitira kuti nzira yavose ive nyore kutevera.

steps.title: Chinodikanwa chinopiwa
paragraphs: Sangano, boka, kana munhu oga oga anogona kutumira chikumbiro chakavakirwa pane chinodikanwa chaicho chokuwanika.
Zvikumbiro zvinogona kutanga kuburikidza newebhusaiti, neemail ku contact@iatf.cc, kana kuti kupfurikidza neDiscord.

steps.title: IATF inoongorora
paragraphs: Tinodzokorora kukodzera kwebasa racho, kushanda kwaro, uye kana basa racho richibatanidzwa muchirongwa chevoruzhinji chakavhurika.

steps.title: Repository yeruzhinji inogadzirwa
paragraphs: Kana chirongwa chakagamuchirwa, chinoburitswa muIATF GitHub sangano pasi pecopyleft rezinesi.
Repository inova musha wevoruzhinji wekodhi, nyaya, zvinyorwa, uye zvinoburitswa.

steps.title: Injiniya ane mutoro anotungamirira basa racho
paragraphs: Injiniya ane mutoro anogoverwa kunzvimbo yekuchengetera chirongwa uye kuvandudzwa kunoitika paruzhinji.

header.title: Ongorora basa razvino kana kutanga chirongwa chaicho

paragraphs: Shandisa rejista kuti uone zviri pachena kare, kana kuti tanga kutora kana chinetso chaicho chokuwanika chichifanira kuva chirongwa.
